briefing_memo: Coradix Technology Consulting has received federal funding through multiple contracts, though the total amount to date is not specified in available records. On June 6, 2025, the Government of Canada barred both Dalian Enterprises and Coradix Technology Consulting from participating in procurement opportunities for 7 years following the ArriveCan contracting scandal (cjme.com), and Public Services and Procurement Canada suspended Coradix on March 6, 2024, from all federal contracts due to integrity concerns related to alleged collusion, credential falsification, and contract irregularities involving at least $59.5 million in questionable spending. RCMP, Integrity Commissioner, and Privacy Commissioner investigations into these matters remain ongoing as of the most recent reporting in 2024, with no documented remediation, settlement, or leadership changes. Given the current 7-year procurement ban imposed in 2025 and active investigations into serious integrity violations, continued engagement with this entity is not recommended until investigations conclude and substantive remediation is demonstrated.

actions.title: Suspend all active funding agreements and disbursements
actions.rationale: Public Services and Procurement Canada issued a formal suspension of Coradix Technology Consulting Ltd. in March 2024, indicating current ineligibility for federal contracting.

actions.title: Refer file to departmental integrity framework unit for debarment review
actions.rationale: Active PSPC suspension coupled with RCMP investigation into alleged misconduct in CBSA contracts requires immediate integrity regime assessment.

actions.title: Request status update from RCMP on ongoing investigation
actions.rationale: The 2019 RCMP probe into alleged misconduct in outsourced CBSA contracts appears unresolved and may inform eligibility determinations.

actions.title: Conduct enhanced financial and compliance audit of all past disbursements
actions.rationale: The pattern of critical adverse news and formal government suspension warrants retrospective review of all funds previously disbursed to this entity.
